title: hippochaete praealta var. scabrella
intro: Hippochaete praealta var. scabrella, also known as a variety of the more commonly recognized Equisetum praealtum, is a type of fern-like, vascular plant that belongs to the Equisetum genus. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits associated with Hippochaete praealta var. scabrella include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made through drying and processing the rhizomes, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
